title: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-SB-W, flush mount for UVC-G5-DOME
category: Cameras, security / Mounting boxes and brackets / Concealed ceiling
description: UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-SB-W in white is designed for mounting UVC-G5-DOME cameras into ceiling panels or walls. With a bracket depth of 88 mm, you can install your camera in a way that minimally disrupts the overall appearance of the interior. The glass dome is made of smoked glass for enhanced discretion
